description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsBlack handbag, two front and one back external zipper, metallic plate branding, two main zipped compartments, one internal zipper and mobile pouch, two short handles woven through metallic loops, contrast stitched detailing along the edges, stylish leatherette zip pullsMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe with cloth when requiredSizeLength: 35 cmWidth: 44 cmDepth: 2 cm
